headline.purpose: Screen titles and featured card names. The type ceiling; no oversized display.

body.purpose: Descriptions and reading copy. Cap at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, chip text, secondary meta.

tiny.purpose: Nav labels and smallest meta. Never load-bearing reading.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default lift for white cards on the blue gradient. Barely-there, calm.

shadows.name: card-featured
shadows.purpose: Slightly more lift for hero/featured cards.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Modals, sheets, and the glass nav's ambient field.

motion.name: tap-press-button
motion.purpose: whileTap feedback on buttons (mobile-first touch press).

motion.name: tap-press-card
motion.purpose: whileTap feedback on cards and large tap surfaces.

motion.name: nav-indicator-spring
motion.purpose: Sliding white pill on the liquid-glass bottom nav.

motion.name: ease-touch
motion.purpose: Default 0.2s easing for state transitions and .animate-touch.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Wider layouts; cards may go multi-column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per screen. Deep navy, white label, tactile press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #091A7A; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Lexend, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background 0.18s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0B1F92; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(9,26,122,0.5); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting action. Sky blue fill, navy label.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #ADC8FF; color: #091A7A; font-family: Lexend, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background 0.18s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #9CBBFA; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(9,26,122,0.4); }

components.name: Info Chip
components.description: Pale-blue meta chip for time, room counts, and stats.
components.html: 12 min
components.css: .ds-chip-info { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #EAF4FF; color: #3D8FEF; font-family: Lexend, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 12px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Comfortable, touch-friendly field with a soft navy focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: #FFFFFF; color: #2C2C2C; font-family: Lexend, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; padding: 12px 14px; min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid #E2E8F4; border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B7280; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #091A7A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(9,26,122,0.18); }

components.name: Palace Card
components.description: Standard content card: white surface, sky-gradient media zone, soft navy shadow, progress bar.
components.html:
🏛️

Roman Forum

Beginner (8 rooms)

12 min
Progress60%
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0px 6px 16px rgba(19,44,74,0.06); overflow: hidden; font-family: Lexend, sans-serif; } .ds-card-media { height: 130px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ADC8FF 0%, #E8F2FF 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 56px; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #2C2C2C; } .ds-card-sub { margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #2C2C2C; } .ds-card-sub b { font-weight: 500; } .ds-card-meta { margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-chip-info { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #EAF4FF; color: #3D8FEF; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-card-progress { padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #F2F2F2; } .ds-card-progress-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 12px; color: #8C8C8C; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-card-pct { font-weight: 600; color: #091A7A; } .ds-card-track { height: 6px; background: #F2F2F2; border-radius: 9999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-fill { height: 100%; width: 60%; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #091A7A 0%, #4F8EFF 100%); }

components.name: Liquid Glass Bottom Nav
components.description: Signature floating glass tab bar; active tab marked by a white pill plus a navy dot (never color alone).
components.css: .ds-nav { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; width: 320px; height: 72px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 40px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(9,26,122,0.60), rgba(26,43,138,0.50), rgba(9,26,122,0.60)); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(9,26,122,0.25); } .ds-nav-item { position: relative; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; min-width: 72px; min-height: 56px; border: none; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font-family: Lexend, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; transition: transform 0.18s; } .ds-nav-item span { transition: color 0.25s, opacity 0.25s; } .ds-nav-item:active { transform: scale(0.92); } .ds-nav-item.is-active { color: #091A7A; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.96), rgba(255,255,255,0.88)); border-radius: 24px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-item.is-active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #091A7A; }

narrative.overview: Mindscape feels like a calm, daylit architectural interior: an airy room where blue sky meets glass, with clear depth and nothing crowding the view. The method of loci is about moving through remembered space, so the interface itself reads as space. White surfaces float on a soft blue-to-white gradient, glass elements catch light, and a single deep navy anchors every important action. It is unhurried and premium first, motivating second, credible underneath. Density is deliberately low: phone-first, one ritual per screen, color doing the work of hierarchy. Reward and delight are real but rationed, reserved for genuine milestones so they keep their meaning.
keyCharacteristics: Daylit, spatial, glass-and-sky atmosphere over a blue->white gradient ground.
One deep navy carries identity; everything else is light blue, glass, and breathing room.
One ritual per screen; calm comes from subtraction.
Soft, navy-tinted ambient depth, never hard or heavy.
Phone-first touch craft: 44px+ targets, whileTap press feedback, 60fps transform motion.

rules.name: The One Navy Rule
rules.body: Atrium Navy is the only saturated dark in the system and appears on a minority of any screen: the primary action, the active state, the numbers that matter. Its rarity against all the light blue is the point. Never tint large surfaces navy in light mode; navy is ink and action, not background.

rules.name: The Daylight Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds run light blue at the top to white below, like a lit room. The ground is never flat gray and never a warm cream/sand neutral. Atmosphere is carried by blue light, not by tinting neutrals warm.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Lexend does every job. Weight and size create hierarchy; a second typeface does not. If a screen needs more emphasis, go heavier or larger in Lexend, never reach for another font.

rules.name: The Navy-Tint Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is tinted navy (rgba around 9,26,122 / 19,44,74), never neutral black. If a card looks stamped-out rather than lit, the shadow lost its tint or its blur got too small.

dos: Do anchor every screen with one Atrium Navy (#091A7A) primary action and keep navy a minority of the surface.
Do ground screens in the blue->white daylight gradient; carry warmth and energy through accent and motion, never through a tinted neutral background.
Do tint every shadow navy and keep it low and wide.
Do use one family, Lexend, across all roles; build hierarchy with weight and size.
Do ration delight: animate genuine milestones, not every tap.
Do keep cards in the 12-24px radius band, white surface, soft navy shadow, 16px padding.
Do give every interactive element a real touch state (whileTap press, 44x44px min target) and a visible focus ring.
Do convey status with icon/shape plus color, never color alone.
donts: Don't build a corporate SaaS dashboard: no dense data tables, gray enterprise chrome, or spreadsheet-density progress.
Don't ship a cluttered/busy UI: no competing CTAs, no information overload, no cramped layouts. One ritual per screen.
Don't let anything read cheap or templated: no stock filler gradients, no default-component look.
Don't fall into childish gamification: no cartoon mascots, no constant confetti, no loud reward spam.
Don't use a black (untinted) drop shadow on the blue ground; it reads as a dated app.
Don't tint large light-mode surfaces navy; navy is ink and action, not background.
Don't use Muted (#8C8C8C) or Faint (#AEAEAE) for small body text or placeholders on white; bump toward Ink to clear 4.5:1.
Don't introduce a second typeface. The leftover Geist Variable in tailwind.css conflicts with the live Lexend body font; resolve to one family.
Don't over-round: cards top out near 24px. Reserve 40/50px radii for the glass nav and pills.
